name: Garnet
description:
Garnet is the leader of the Crystal Gems. She loves herself, her planets, and her friends. Being a fusion at first was hard, but she’s strong enough to handle anything that comes to spilt her up. Garnets a great mentor to Steven and the other Crystal Gems. Her powers are future vision, gauntlets, rocket fists, electricity, shape shifting, and double the strength from being a fusion. Made of the love from Ruby and Sapphire.

-Descriptions from the Steven Universe fan wiki-
creator: Phantomfizz
